name: memobox
description: Opt-in, index-first local memory files for AI agents.

interface.longDescription: When a project already contains .memobox, use MemoBox skills to read its JSON index before non-trivial work, let the model choose what to reuse, and write only durable high-value outcomes with reusable memory ids recorded as source references.
defaultPrompt: In an opted-in project, use MemoBox index-first before non-trivial work.
At task end, write a MemoBox record only for a durable high-value outcome.
Use MemoBox to review checkpoints and curate exact memory ids.
